owner_priority: Reach the first functional owner-testable Strategic Nexus v0 as quickly as safely possible; defer polish until the real-game validation loop exists. Current MP handoff copy/status surfaces now include the open action, share guidance, and continuity hints; the remaining 15G work is deeper host/client workflow polish and real-season validation.
selection_rule: Take owner-approved suggestion chunks first, then the first ready unblocked roadmap chunk in order, unless current code already satisfies it; reactive policy-pack chunks supersede polish/convenience chunks when generated-overlay gameplay effect is the blocker; then verify and record evidence.
exhaustion_rule: If all queued chunks are completed while the roadmap still contains unblocked IN_PROGRESS or NOT_STARTED work, refresh this queue from the roadmap or implement the next obvious bounded roadmap chunk; do not end with no_safe_task.
chunk_finish_rule: Targeted validation, fail-safe behavior for unsafe inputs where applicable, one coherent commit before the next implementation chunk.
current_source: The acceptance plan is documented, indexed, surfaced in sprint mode, surfaced in the owner collaboration model, surfaced in the master architecture index, and surfaced in the v0 scope/pipeline plan; the current MP handoff slice now covers the status-window open action plus share and continuity hints in the tray/status surfaces, and the remaining bounded gap is deeper 15G host/client workflow polish or owner validation.

chunks.title: Document generated overlay acceptance gap
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Minimal Strategy Dimensions / generated overlay gameplay acceptance gap
chunks.goal: Document the remaining mod-side acceptance evidence needed to verify generated-overlay behavior in a real Stellaris session and make the owner-run check repeatable.
acceptance: The owner-facing playbook or equivalent doc states what to test in-game, what evidence to capture, and what limitations still remain.
The documented gap stays bounded to generated-overlay gameplay verification rather than broad strategic redesign.
The next owner run can follow the documented checklist without reinterpreting the roadmap from scratch.

chunks.title: Index generated overlay acceptance plan
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Master architecture index / roadmap visibility for generated overlay acceptance
chunks.goal: Add the generated overlay gameplay acceptance plan to the canonical navigation surfaces so future workers can find the owner checklist and evidence path without re-searching the docs tree.
acceptance: The master architecture index points at docs/GENERATED_OVERLAY_GAMEPLAY_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN.md.
The development roadmap references the same plan or evidence path in its current progress notes.
The change remains bounded to documentation and navigation, not new gameplay behavior.

chunks.title: Surface generated overlay acceptance in sprint mode
chunks.roadmap_anchor: V0 sprint mode guidance / generated overlay acceptance visibility
chunks.goal: Add a short sprint-mode reference to the generated overlay acceptance checklist so worker selection and owner-test readiness both point at the same evidence path.
acceptance: docs/V0_SPRINT_MODE.md mentions docs/GENERATED_OVERLAY_GAMEPLAY_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN.md or its evidence path.
The added text stays bounded to worker selection / owner-test readiness guidance.
No new gameplay behavior or wider roadmap scope is introduced.

chunks.title: Surface generated overlay acceptance in collaboration model
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Project owner collaboration model / generated overlay acceptance visibility
chunks.goal: Add a brief owner-facing reference to the generated overlay acceptance checklist so collaboration guidance points at the same evidence path as sprint mode and the roadmap.
acceptance: docs/PROJECT_OWNER_COLLABORATION_MODEL.md mentions docs/GENERATED_OVERLAY_GAMEPLAY_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN.md or its evidence path.
The added text remains owner-facing and bounded to acceptance evidence visibility.
The change does not broaden scope beyond documentation and collaboration guidance.

chunks.title: Surface generated overlay evidence in master index
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Master architecture index / generated overlay acceptance evidence visibility
chunks.goal: Add the generated overlay acceptance evidence artifact path to the canonical architecture index so the checklist and evidence file are both visible from the top-level navigation layer.
acceptance: docs/MASTER_ARCHITECTURE_INDEX.md mentions dist/private_reports/generated_overlay_gameplay_acceptance_v0.json alongside docs/GENERATED_OVERLAY_GAMEPLAY_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN.md.
The wording stays limited to navigation and evidence visibility.
No new runtime behavior or broader architecture scope is introduced.

chunks.title: Surface generated overlay evidence in v0 scope plan
chunks.roadmap_anchor: V0 scope and pipeline plan / generated overlay acceptance evidence visibility
chunks.goal: Add the generated overlay acceptance evidence artifact path to the core v0 scope/pipeline plan so the main pipeline doc points at both the checklist and the evidence file.
acceptance: docs/V0_SCOPE_AND_PIPELINE_PLAN.md mentions docs/GENERATED_OVERLAY_GAMEPLAY_ACCEPTANCE_PLAN.md or dist/private_reports/generated_overlay_gameplay_acceptance_v0.json.
The wording stays limited to the v0 pipeline boundary and evidence visibility.
No new runtime behavior or broader architecture scope is introduced.

chunks.title: Allowlisted event-family branch compiler tests
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Reactive policy-pack DSL/compiler support for allowlisted event-family branches
chunks.goal: Add the first bounded compiler/test slice for allowlisted event-family branches so the reactive-policy-pack path can validate a real branch without opening the whole strategic surface.
acceptance: The DSL/compiler path rejects unallowlisted event-family values and accepts the approved branch shape.
The change stays bounded to the reactive-policy-pack compiler/test slice.
Existing generated overlay and v0 pipeline contracts remain fail-closed.

chunks.title: Refresh reactive family roadmap note
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Development roadmap / reactive policy-pack compiler coverage note
chunks.goal: Record the newly verified allowlisted reactive event-family coverage in the roadmap and point the next worker-ready slice at the remaining base on_action dispatcher wiring.
acceptance: The roadmap explicitly notes the current allowlisted reactive families covered by compiler tests.
The roadmap or queue now points the next worker-ready slice at the remaining dispatcher wiring work instead of leaving the reactive-policy-pack area stale.
The change stays bounded to documentation/queue continuity.

chunks.title: Wire base on_action dispatcher for reactive families
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Reactive policy-pack architecture / base on_action dispatcher wiring
chunks.goal: Wire the remaining base on_action dispatcher path so the allowlisted reactive families route through the generated overlay path without reopening unallowlisted event families.
acceptance: The base on_action dispatcher routes the allowlisted reactive families through the generated overlay branch path.
Unallowlisted event-family inputs remain fail-closed and do not open new runtime branches.
The change remains bounded to the reactive-policy-pack dispatcher wiring slice and its regression coverage.

chunks.title: Verify startup shortcut toggle contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Startup shortcut toggle contract in SNC status and tray surfaces
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status, tray, and brief outputs keep the startup shortcut toggle surface explicit, including the shortcut state, command-hint source, and active install/remove guidance for installed, missing, and unavailable shortcut paths.
acceptance: Status, tray, and brief outputs keep start_with_windows_shortcut_state explicit.
Status, tray, and brief outputs keep start_with_windows_command_hint_source explicit.
Status, tray, and brief outputs keep the active install/remove hint explicit and fail closed for installed, missing, and unavailable shortcut paths.

chunks.title: Verify reactive capability/source quality signal
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Status Center/reactive capability and bootstrap source-quality signal
chunks.goal: Verify that the companion status surfaces keep the generated overlay reactive capability and bootstrap source-quality signal explicit in CLI, tray, and JSON output.
acceptance: Companion status output keeps reactive_policy_pack_capability explicit as post_session_only or event_family_dispatch.
Companion status output keeps source_qualities explicit and fail-closed, including history_backed and zero_history_bootstrap when applicable.
Companion status output keeps bootstrap_campaign_count explicit so owner-facing status does not require opening the manifest manually.

chunks.title: Verify support report approval contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Status Center / support report approval and preview contract
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status, tray, and CLI outputs keep the support report preview and approval gate explicit before any send action is possible.
acceptance: Companion status output keeps support_report_state explicit across JSON, tray, and CLI surfaces.
Companion status output keeps support_report_send_requires_approval explicit and fail-closed.
Companion status output keeps support_report_prepare_command_hint explicit so the owner can preview locally before any send action.

chunks.title: Verify generated overlay publish gate contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Status Center / generated overlay publish gate contract
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status, tray, and CLI outputs keep the staged generated-overlay publish gate explicit, including allow/deny state, owner approval, and the active publish command hint.
acceptance: Companion status output keeps generated_overlay_publish_gate_status explicit across JSON, tray, and CLI surfaces.
Companion status output keeps generated_overlay_publish_allowed and generated_overlay_publish_gate_can_publish explicit and fail-closed.
Companion status output keeps generated_overlay_publish_gate_owner_approval_required and the publish command hint explicit for staged overlay follow-up.

chunks.title: Verify campaign library plan status contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Generated campaign library maintenance / plan status visibility
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status, tray, and real-session outputs keep the campaign-library plan presence, source, readiness, reason, limit state, and skipped-count signals explicit and fail closed.
acceptance: Companion status output keeps campaign_library_plan_present, campaign_library_plan_path, campaign_library_plan_source, campaign_library_plan_readiness, and campaign_library_plan_reason explicit.
Companion status output keeps campaign_library_limit_reached and campaign_library_skipped_due_to_limit_count explicit and fail closed for missing or unsupported plan files.
Real-session loop outputs continue to forward the same campaign-library plan contract fields for owner/release-companion inspection.

chunks.title: Verify release-companion MP package UX contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX
chunks.goal: Verify that the companion, tray, and real-session surfaces keep MP export/import/verify command hints, copyable share guidance, mismatch warnings, and missing-previous-host recovery cues explicit for ordinary host and client users.
acceptance: Companion and Status Center outputs keep MP export/import/verify command hints and copyable package status text explicit.
Companion and real-session outputs keep mismatch warnings plus missing-previous-host recovery guidance explicit and fail closed.
The release-companion contract stays usable without requiring an IP-address workflow.

chunks.title: Surface MP package copy and tray open action
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / copyable handoff summary
chunks.goal: Make MP package handoff details directly usable from the companion status window and tray by copying the package path, zip, manifest hash, and host/client guidance, and by exposing a tray action that opens the MP package directory.
acceptance: The status-window copy payload includes MP package handoff details that ordinary host/client users can paste without reopening raw JSON.
The tray menu exposes a direct action that opens the MP package directory.
The new UX stays fail-safe when MP package fields are missing or the directory must be created before opening.

chunks.title: Surface entry-point memory recovery signals
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Daemon-Loss Memory Recovery
chunks.goal: Expose branch-aware memory recovery anchors and degraded-memory warnings in the real-session loop evidence so loadable save anchors are visible when autosave history is partial or missing.
acceptance: Real-session loop output includes recovery state, confidence, anchor save identity, and warning visibility fields.
The evidence JSON carries a memory_recovery object with the same fields for downstream automation.
Branch ambiguity or missing history downgrades recovery confidence instead of pretending full certainty.

chunks.title: Surface human-control guard state in owner-facing status
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Human-Control Guarded MP Rules / owner-facing guard visibility
chunks.goal: Expose the already-computed human-control guard state in the companion status summary, tray JSON, and tray-facing brief so owners can see the guard without hunting through nested JSON.
acceptance: The companion status summary includes a human_control_guard_state line.
The tray status JSON exposes human_control_guard_state as a top-level field.
The tray-facing brief or dashboard text surfaces the guard state in a readable line and keeps unknown values fail-closed.

chunks.title: Surface daemon-loss memory recovery signals
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Branch-aware memory reconstruction / daemon-loss memory recovery
chunks.goal: Expose a fail-closed memory recovery anchor in the companion status surfaces so the owner can see when SNC is falling back to the latest loadable save because autosave history is partial or missing.
acceptance: Companion JSON, tray text, and status-center summary expose memory recovery state, confidence, warning visibility, and the selected anchor save identity.
Confidence downgrades when history is missing, branch evidence conflicts, or no compatible anchor exists.
The new fields fail closed when entry-point analysis is unreadable or unavailable.

chunks.title: Verify branch-aware memory recovery degradation
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Branch-Aware Memory Reconstruction
chunks.goal: Verify that branch ambiguity in the entry-point analysis downgrades memory recovery to a visible degraded state instead of presenting the latest loadable save as fully confident.
acceptance: The companion status summary shows degraded memory recovery with reduced confidence when branch ambiguity is detected.
The snapshot JSON keeps the memory_recovery object explicit and warning-visible for ambiguous entry-point analysis.
The branch-aware recovery note stays fail-closed and does not claim high confidence under ambiguous evidence.

chunks.title: Verify local LLM model manager surface contract
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Local LLM Model Manager / reduced mode and model readiness visibility
chunks.goal: Verify that SNC status and tray surfaces keep local LLM reduced mode, accepted model readiness, and explicit prepare command guidance visible and fail closed.
acceptance: Companion status snapshot and tray summary expose local_llm_model_status and local_llm_* readiness fields.
No-model state reports reduced mode and blocks inference.
Supported ready state clears reduced mode, keeps model state path and prepare command hint visible.
Unknown selected model fails closed and surfaces attention state.

chunks.title: Surface MP package status-window open action
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / status-window open-directory affordance
chunks.goal: Add a direct status-window action that opens the MP overlay package directory so host users can reach the handoff package without leaving the companion window.
acceptance: The companion status window includes a visible MP package open action/button.
The action creates the package directory if needed and opens it safely instead of failing on a missing directory.
The rest of the MP copy/share text remains unchanged and fail closed.

chunks.title: Surface MP package command hints in status dashboard
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / visible verify-import hints
chunks.goal: Expose MP verify/import command hints in the visible status dashboard and copied handoff text so host and client users can act without hunting the raw JSON snapshot.
acceptance: The visible dashboard text includes MP verify/import command hints when the package snapshot provides them.
The copied dashboard text includes the same MP verify/import command hints and keeps the existing share text intact.
The rest of the MP handoff surface remains fail closed when command hints are unavailable.

chunks.title: Surface MP package verify/import copy actions
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / verify-import quick actions
chunks.goal: Add visible quick-copy actions in the status dashboard for MP verify/import commands so host and client users can copy the exact commands without hunting the text block.
acceptance: The status dashboard includes visible MP verify/import quick-copy actions when commands are present.
Clicking the actions copies the respective command to clipboard and leaves the existing dashboard copy/share text intact.
The buttons fail closed when command hints are unavailable or empty.

chunks.title: Surface MP package handoff status in visible dashboard
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / host-rotation continuity visibility
chunks.goal: Expose MP handoff status in the visible dashboard so host-rotation continuity and degraded handoff state are visible without reopening the copied text block.
acceptance: The visible dashboard text includes MP handoff status when the package snapshot provides it.
The added line stays fail closed when handoff status is unavailable or empty.
The copied dashboard/share text remains unchanged apart from any existing handoff fields already present.

chunks.title: Surface MP package mismatch warning in visible dashboard
chunks.roadmap_anchor: Release Companion MP Package UX / mismatch warning presentation
chunks.goal: Expose MP mismatch warning state in the visible dashboard so host and client users can see package identity risk without opening the raw JSON snapshot.
acceptance: The visible dashboard text includes MP mismatch warning state or alert text when present.
The added warning line stays fail closed when no mismatch warning is available.
The copied dashboard/share text keeps the existing MP handoff text intact while including the same mismatch warning signal.
